name: Churu Bites Dog Treats - Chicken Recipe Wraps - Chicken with Salmon Recipe
description: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wrapped with Chicken & Salmon Recipe are irresistibly soft, pillow-shaped treats designed to satisfy even the most selective dogs. Each bite combines a soft baked chicken paste exterior with a creamy Churu-style chicken and salmon filling , delivering two delicious textures in every mouthful. Crafted with wholesome, high-quality ingredients , including farm-raised chicken and natural tuna, these treats are grain-free and made without preservatives, carrageenan, or artificial colours. With a high 72% moisture content , they help support daily hydration while remaining gentle and easy to chew. Perfect for training, rewarding, or administering medication , Churu Bites are suitable for puppies, adult dogs, and senior dogs alike. Each individually portioned tube helps keep treats fresh, ensures convenient on-the-go feeding, and prevents messes. At approximately 16 kcal per pack , they’re a low-calorie treat you can feel good about giving daily. Enriched with Vitamin E to support immune health and Green Tea Extract for antioxidant benefits, these soft and savoury treats deliver both taste and nutrition in every bite. Key Benefits Dual-texture treat with soft chicken outside and creamy chicken & salmon centre Made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients Grain-free with no artificial colours, preservatives, or carrageenan 72% moisture to support hydration Low-calorie treat suitable for daily rewards Vitamin E for immune system support Green tea extract provides antioxidant benefits Ideal for training, bonding, or hiding medication Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. This product is not intended to be fed as a meal. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water. For your pet’s health, consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Ingredients Chicken, Water, Tuna, Tapioca Starch, Egg White, Sodium Caseinate, Salmon, Guar Gum, Natural Chicken Flavor, Yeast Extract, Vitamin E Supplement, Paprika Oleoresin (Colour), Green Tea Extract. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 22.00% Crude Fat (min): 3.00% Crude Fiber (max): 0.50% Moisture (max): 72.00% Vitamin E (min): 80 IU/kg Calorie Content 1300 kcal/kg 15.6 kcal per pack (ME) Net Weight 3.36 oz (0.42 oz × 8 tubes)
